response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two distinct vocal performances separated by an instrumental transition. 2. Song 1: "My Soul, Your Beats!" performed by Hakui Koyori et al. Identified original artist as Lia from 'Angel Beats!'. Searched and retrieved official lyrics. 3. Interlude (03:16-03:43): Confirmed no vocal music. 4. Song 2: "管制塔より" performed by Hakui Koyori. On-screen text credits Shota Horie for music. Search for official lyrics failed, so lyrics were transcribed from the video. 5. Constructed final JSON structure with identified metadata and full lyrics for both songs.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber, Hakui Koyori, performing two vocal songs: 'My Soul, Your Beats!' and her original song '管制塔より' (From the Control Tower).

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori and others perform 'My Soul, Your Beats!'. On-screen text indicates the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
襟のタイをきつく締め
教室のドアくぐると ほんの少し胸を張って歩き出せる
そんな日常に吹き抜ける風
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震えだす今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾億の星が消え去ってくのを
見送った
手を振った
よかったね、と

廊下の隅見下ろす 掃除の途中
おかしなものだと 思う
あたしの中の時は止まってるのに
違う日々を生きてるように
埃は雪のように降り積む
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震えだす今この時が
見つけた気がした
失われた記憶が呼び覚ました
物語
永遠の
その終わり

いつの間にか駆けだしてた
あなたに手を引かれてた
昨日は遠く 明日はすぐ
そんな当たり前に心が踊った
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震えだす今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾千の朝を越え 新しい陽が
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震えてるこの魂が
見つけた気がした
幾億の夢のように消え去れる日を
見送った
手を振った
ありがとう、と
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I wake up and repeat
Tighten the collar tie
If you go through the classroom door, you can walk a little bit
The wind that blows through such everyday life
I felt like I heard it
I felt it
Now my heart is trembling
I felt it coming
The billions of stars are disappearing
I looked back
Waved my hand
I'm glad, to...

Looking down the corner of the hallway in the middle of cleaning
I think it's strange
Even though the time inside me has stopped
It's like living different days
Dust accumulates like snow
I felt like waiting
I felt like calling
Now this time is trembling
I felt like finding
Lost memories awakened
A story
Of eternity
That end

Before I knew it, I was running
Pulled by you
Yesterday was far away, tomorrow is near
My heart danced so naturally
I felt like I heard it
I felt it
Now my heart is trembling
I felt it coming
Crossing thousands of mornings, a new day
I felt like waiting
I felt like calling
This trembling soul
I felt like finding
Days that disappear like thousands of dreams
I looked back
Waved my hand
Thank you, to...

scenes.description: Atmospheric instrumental transition with visual effects.
Hakui Koyori performs her original song '管制塔より'. On-screen text includes credits to Shota Horie.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぽつり灯り 管制塔
砂嵐の向こうへ
祈るように 綴った
これからのこと

ラジオネーム 匿名希望
お便り届いてますか？
この世界がいつからか
まるで他人事のように
やけに静かなので
不安になったのです
思い出 したのです

人知れず 口を継ぐんだまま
終われてないのです
それは嫌なのです

夢ってもっと
わがままだったでしょう
語ってよ 笑ってよ 気づいてよ

此処に居るのに
意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を

どうしたら
伝えられるのでしょう

どうしても伝えたいよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Flickering light, control tower
Towards the other side of the sandstorm
I wrote down, as if praying
About things to come

Anonymous Hope, radio name
Have my letters reached you?
Since when did this world
Become so quiet, as if someone else's affair?
I became anxious
I remembered

Unbeknownst to anyone, keeping my mouth shut
It hasn't ended
I don't like that

Dreams should have been more
Selfish, right?
Tell me, laugh, notice me

Even though I'm here
How mean you are
To the light that reaches no one

What can I do
To convey it?
I want to convey it, no matter what.
